brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Pull every log from auth-svc. In DDSQL — service:auth-svc. That's the new shape.

hints.text: Carol: 'That's too many. You want just auth-svc. service:auth-svc.'
Carol: 'Not enough rows. auth-svc logs for the last hour should be around 150.'
Carol: 'Query error. Try: service:auth-svc — key colon value, no quotes, no equals sign.'
Carol: 'service:auth-svc — the key is service, colon, then the value. That filters to just that service.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: About a hundred fifty. That's normal volume for an hour. Auth is the bottom of the stack — nothing builds on top of nothing.
